prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 350 HP and 369 lb-ft on 93 octane with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger (0.83 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer, 71mm exducer) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** (external, V-band) and **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System** (with integrated MAF housing)

Full **Forge Motorsport** cooling system overhaul: **1.5L catch can** (dual baffled, AN-10 fittings), **aluminum coolant expansion tank** (with integrated degassing port), **76mm front-mount intercooler** (core dimensions: 24.5" x 6.5" x 3.5"), and **CorkSport stainless steel charge pipes** (3" diameter, TIG-welded, silicone coupler reinforcements)

Drivetrain reinforcement via **034 Motorsport** components: **Stage 2 clutch kit** (multi-disc, 6-puck sprung hub, 550 ft-lb torque capacity), **lightweight aluminum flywheel** (11.8 lbs, SFI-certified), **limited-slip differential** (VAQ-style, 40% lockup under load), and **034 Motorsport transmission mounts** (solid, 80A durometer polyurethane)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Jetta** widebody kit (front fenders: +30mm, rear fenders: +40mm, bolt-on over OEM flares) with **custom carbon fiber lip spoiler** (3D-scanned to match OEM trunk contours) and **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** (matte bronze, 5x112 PCD, 245/35/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires)

**EuroCode Motorsport** suspension setup: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (2-way adjustable, 30-way rebound, 12-way compression, 50mm stroke), **H&R 25mm front sway bar** (hollow, adjustable end links), **034 Motorsport subframe collars** (aluminum, +15mm stiffness), and **Neuspeed rear camber arms** (adjustable, spherical bearings, -2.5° camber)

**VWVortex** OEM+ exterior mods: **VW Motorsport rear diffuser** (painted to match **Limestone Yellow** Autobahn Edition code **LY1H**), **Hella Dynamic Cornering Headlights** (LED matrix, adaptive, **VW Part # 5G1941751A**), and **custom vinyl wrap** (3M 2080 Satin Pearl White, 50% gloss, with **blackout B-pillar trim** and **red GLI badge overlays**)
